wishes.name: Ahmmd
wishes.message: Happy bday naba and I hope you are having a great day, hope that you are fine and well and hope that your health becomes better, don't forget to enjoy your day and be around people that you love!

wishes.name: Bastaki
wishes.message:
Hi Nadada, As you can see, my time has come to an end, and I'll become expired soon.

I wanted to let you know that you made my days happier just by being there. Your kind heart and your presence have a way of making every room shine brighter. You're amazing simply by being yourself, turning sad days into happy and enjoyable ones.

You'll always have a special place deep in my heart, and I truly wish you nothing but the very best in life happiness, success, and a future free from troubles.

Happy Birthday enjoy your special day and suk toe. :zzmilklove:

wishes.name: zee
wishes.message:
Happiest birthdayyy Nada💗
U can be the cutiest and sweetiest person i’ve ever seen!!!😻I’m wishing you perfect birthday and shiny,sparkling future<33
May Allah make you as beautiful as star and as free as sky🌸
Till now,i had soo sweet moments with you and i hope we’ll continue to have more and more day by day inshallah ya roohi❤️
بحبّك من قلبي يا قلبي، إنتي عينيّا😻😻😻❤️

wishes.name: SJOD
wishes.message: happy birthday nada!! i can no longer call you a kid that makes me rlly sad but its ok i forgive you, hope u have fun and enjoy ur dayyyy

wishes.name: Lefan
wishes.message:
I have no clue about what the future is hiding to anyone, but I will always wish you the best, and thanks for helping me out, sorry if I couldnt be much of a help if you needed help once,
Forgetting the past looking at the future, I wish you a pleasant birthday and a happy new year🩷🦋🌸

wishes.name: souffle
wishes.message:
Happy Birthday!! ₍ᐢ. .ᐢ₎♡

I heard it was your birthday, so I wanted to drop by and say hello! It's been a really long time since we last talked, but I still remember the fun times we had playing together. (˶ᵔ ᵕ ᵔ˶)

I hope you've been doing well and that today is filled with lots of happiness, good food, and wonderful memories. ✨

Wishing you a year full of good luck, success, and things that make you smile! ヽ(✿ﾟ▽ﾟ)ノ

Take care, and enjoy your special day! (｡･ω･｡)ﾉ♡

wishes.name: hussain
wishes.message: كل عام و انتي بخير و اتمنى لكي حياة مديدة و سعيدة

wishes.name: Panos
wishes.message: Nadaaa happy birthdayyy, I wish you the best in life and anything you may persue. Hope you spend this day with your loved ones and if you need anything I’m 1 dm away. Again HAPPY BIRTHDAY

wishes.name: seif
wishes.message: hi girl enjoy the rest of ur day happy birthdayyy!!!!  🫶

wishes.name: ryan
wishes.message: Happy birthday Nada hope you have happy days for the rest of your life

wishes.name: Dom
wishes.message: Happy birthday Nada wish u happy days

wishes.name: ahmad
wishes.message: Happy Birthday! 🎂 Sending you the biggest wishes from a modern country to the desert! Hope your day is filled with Bollywood-level celebrations, luxury Dubai vibes, and absolutely no traffic on Sheikh Zayed Road. Have a good year gng

wishes.name: Bunkrat
wishes.message: I wish you the best this year and every year! ❤️

wishes.name: i6iicv
wishes.message: اهلا ندى كل عام وانتي بخيرر ان شاءالله ومو يعني بتزيدين سنه تسوين فيها كبيره تراج شبرين ونص فاهمه يلا اذلفي

wishes.message:
Happy birthday Nadooshh 🥳 ,
i wish it was a beautiful year full of happy times & amazing achievements 🎀
hope u have an awesome rest of your day 🤍

wishes.name: Maxi
wishes.message:
Happy Birthday! 🎉🎂

I hope you have an amazing day filled with happiness, laughter, and wonderful memories. You are a great friend, and I wish you all the best for the year ahead. May all your dreams come true and may this year bring you success, good health, and lots of joy. Enjoy your special day you deserve it!
Hbd my niga
Strafallah
